summary: Iteration 137 - Frontend testing for bug fixes: Health Score header hidden, Daily Briefing header hidden, Budget page and sidebar. 8/9 tests passed. One issue found: Budget link not visible in Client Context sidebar PLANNING section (section doesn't expand when clicked from other pages).

ui_bugs.issue: Budget link not visible when PLANNING section is clicked to expand from Client Context mode. The section appears to not expand properly. However, navigating directly to /budget shows Budget correctly in Personal Mode sidebar.

issues: Compliance Modal appears on page load blocking interactions - user must dismiss it before interacting. Known from previous iterations.
Recharts console warnings about width/height -1 on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles

action_items: Verify Client Context sidebar PLANNING section expands correctly to show Budget and Actions links
critical_code_review_comments: navData.js correctly defines Budget in both personalNavGroups (line 26) and clientContextNav (line 131) under Planning section
DecisionEngine.jsx correctly implements embedded prop to hide header (line 131)
DailyBriefing.jsx correctly implements embedded prop to hide header (line 245)
HouseholdBudget.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working: Health Score tab hides 'Financial Decision Engine' header when embedded, Daily Briefing tab hides header when embedded, Budget page loads at /budget with income/expenses/cashflow charts, Investments page has 9+ tabs including SMSF, Client Context /dashboard has 5 tabs. One issue: Client Context sidebar PLANNING section may not expand properly to show Budget link - needs verification.

health_score_header_hidden.details: Health Score tab in Client Context /dashboard does NOT show 'Financial Decision Engine' header - embedded prop working correctly

daily_briefing_header_hidden.details: Daily Briefing tab in Adviser Command Center does NOT show 'Daily Briefing' header - embedded prop working correctly

budget_page_loads.details: Budget page at /budget loads HouseholdBudget with income, expenses, and cashflow charts (data-testid='household-budget-page')

personal_mode_sidebar_budget.details: Personal Mode sidebar PLANNING section includes Budget (NEW) entry - visible when navigating to /budget

client_context_sidebar_budget.details: Client Context sidebar PLANNING section does not expand to show Budget link when clicked. navData.js has correct entry but sidebar section doesn't expand.

client_context_5_tabs.details: Client Context /dashboard shows 5 tabs: Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Health Score, Goals & Scenarios

goals_scenarios_tab.details: Goals & Scenarios tab content loads without duplicate headers

homepage_no_runtime_errors.details: Homepage loads without runtime errors (Chrome extension errors are external, not app code)

investments_page_9_tabs.details: Investments page at /investments loads with 13 tabs including SMSF (more than required 9)
